---
id: delete-space
title: "删除空间"
description: "根据空间 ID 删除空间，可选择是否删除子空间。"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"删除空间"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/spaces/delete"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



根据空间 ID 删除空间，可选择是否删除子空间。

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["spaceId"],"properties":{"spaceId":{"type":"string","description":"空间 ID。"},"deleteChildren":{"type":"boolean","default":false,"description":"是否同时删除子空间。"}},"example":{"spaceId":"space-livingroom-001","deleteChildren":false},"title":"DeleteSpaceRequest"},"example":{"spaceId":"space-livingroom-001","deleteChildren":false}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
